# Acceptance Criteria

## P0 Criteria

| ID | Criterion | Validation | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| P0-1 | Segmenter emits stable segment metadata for text nodes, links, buttons, and placeholders without losing existing target ordering. | `npm test` core segment metadata cases | Passed |
| P0-2 | Scheduler prioritizes cached and above-the-fold segments first, while keeping all visible page segments queued for translation. | `npm test` scheduler planning cases | Passed |
| P0-3 | Translation provider layer accepts segment objects with IDs and returns ID-keyed results while keeping the existing text-array API compatible. | `npm test` background provider cases | Passed |
| P0-4 | Render layer exposes a lightweight page progress state and removes it when translation is stopped. | `npm test` core progress rendering cases | Passed |
| P0-5 | Rule/AI layer merges user site rules and AI structure strategy without disabling the default full-page walker. | `npm test` rule strategy cases | Passed |
| P0-6 | Web pages and PDF pages translate only the current viewport plus the next two screens, deferring later content until scroll. | `npm test` lazy-loading scheduler and PDF visible-range cases | Passed |
| P0-7 | PDF URLs can be opened in a toktra-owned PDF translation view and translated top-to-bottom. | `npm test` popup PDF route and PDF line grouping cases | Passed |

## P1 Criteria

| ID | Criterion | Validation | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| P1-1 | Translation cache keys include provider/model/prompt/language context so changing engines does not reuse stale translations. | `npm test` background cache namespace cases | Passed |
| P1-2 | The architecture is documented as five layers with contracts and failure handling. | Docs review | Passed |
| P1-3 | Longtask summary records implementation, validation, and layer-by-layer review. | Docs review | Passed |

## P2 Criteria

| ID | Criterion | Validation | Status |
|---|---|---|---|

## Out of Scope

- Replacing the whole page text in place like Chrome Translate.
- Adding a hosted backend or external account workflow.
- Full rich-text HTML alignment in this pass.
